title: MoreCrystals
description: MoreCrystals is a 1.20.4 Fabric/Quilt mod to add more crystal and geode variants.
body:
# More Crystals ![Screenshot of all of the crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wl7ah4Tv/images/46ddf48a7cb9c1f6a53ed6da5fcba3eda2ccaa7d.png)
More Crystals is a 1.20.4 Fabric/Quilt mod to add more crystal and geode variants. The current added features are:
• Rose Quartz
• Blue Flourite
• Green Citrine
• Opalite
• Clear Quartz
• Obsidian
BUGS: There is currently a known bug that small amethyst buds will appear in geodes they do not belong in. I have no clue why this happens and I apologize for any inconvenience.
Crystal shards also do nothing at the moment. There will be an update soon providing crafting recipes with the shards.
